description: Fraud involving Unified Payments Interface (UPI) transactions through deceptive payment requests, fake collect requests, malicious links or social engineering techniques.
recommended_actions: Report the incident on the National Cyber Crime Reporting Portal.
Do not approve unknown collect requests.
prevention_tips: Verify the recipient before making payments.

rules.name: Collect Request Scam
rules.explanation: Victim is asked to approve a collect request.
examples: Approve the collect request to receive your refund.
Accept the payment request to claim your prize.

rules.name: UPI PIN Request
rules.explanation: Attempts to obtain the victim's UPI PIN.
examples: Enter your UPI PIN to receive money.

rules.name: Refund Scam
rules.explanation: Uses refunds or cashback to trick victims.
examples: Claim your refund by approving this request.

rules.name: Payment Link Scam
examples: Click this payment link to receive ₹5000.

rules.name: Fake Customer Support
examples: I am calling from your bank's UPI support team.
